headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Dow (DOW) After Its Strong Year To Date Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Dow’s current share price gives you value or risk? This article breaks down what the recent moves might be saying about the stock. Dow closed at US$38.31 recently, after a 4.5% gain over the last 30 days and a 57.8% return year to date, while the 1 year return sits at 41.0% and the 3 and 5 year returns show declines of 12.8% and 19.7% respectively. These mixed time frame returns give useful context for thinking about valuation, especially if you are weighing short term...
